languages.text: {n}Рана колотая, нанесена по касательной — узкое и длинное лезвие проткнуло и распороло кожу. Из-за многочисленных повреждений сосудов и сильного отека ранение выглядит куда более устрашающим, чем есть на самом деле. Настоящий осколок, попав в эту область, лишил бы Изимонда доброй трети черепа.{/n}

{n}It is a stab wound from a glancing blow — a long and narrow blade pierced and tore through the skin. The swelling and various injuries to the blood vessels make the injury look far more gruesome than it is. If a shard from a frag grenade really had struck him, it would have taken out a good third of Sauerback's skull.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Рана колотая, нанесена по касательной — узкое и длинное лезвие проткнуло и распороло кожу. languages.text: {n}Es el corte de una estocada fallida: un filo largo y estrecho atravesó y cortó su carne. La hinchazón y los daños a los vasos sanguíneos hacen que la herida parezca mucho peor de lo que es. De haberle impactado la metralla de una granada frag, se habría llevado un tercio del cráneo de Sauerback.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}It is a stab wound from a glancing blow — a long and narrow blade pierced and tore through the skin. The swelling and various injuries to the blood vessels make the injury look far more gruesome than it is. If a shard from a frag grenade really had struck him, it would have taken out a good third of Sauerback's skull.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Es el corte de una estocada fallida: un filo largo y estrecho atravesó y cortó su carne. La hinchazón y los daños a los vasos sanguíneos hacen que la herida parezca mucho peor de lo que es. De haberle impactado la metralla de una granada frag, se habría llevado un tercio del cráneo de Sauerback.{/n}

languages.text: {n}那是处擦过的刺伤，一把细长的刀刃刺穿并撕裂了皮肉。肿胀加之血管上的种种损伤，让这一伤势看上去比实际严重得多。如果真是手雷破片打的，伊西蒙德·苏尔贝克的小半个脑袋早就飞了。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}It is a stab wound from a glancing blow — a long and narrow blade pierced and tore through the skin. The swelling and various injuries to the blood vessels make the injury look far more gruesome than it is. If a shard from a frag grenade really had struck him, it would have taken out a good third of Sauerback's skull.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Il s'agit visiblement d'une plaie consécutive à un coup oblique porté avec une arme blanche : une lame longue et fine a transpercé ses chairs et déchiré sa peau. Le gonflement et les nombreuses lésions des vaisseaux sanguins lui donnent un aspect bien plus terrible qu'elle ne l'est en réalité. S'il avait vraiment été touché par l'éclat d'une grenade à fragmentation, celui-ci aurait emporté un bon tiers de son crâne.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}It is a stab wound from a glancing blow — a long and narrow blade pierced and tore through the skin. The swelling and various injuries to the blood vessels make the injury look far more gruesome than it is. If a shard from a frag grenade really had struck him, it would have taken out a good third of Sauerback's skull.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Bu, sıyırmış bir darbeden kaynaklanan bir bıçak yarası. Uzun ve dar bir bıçak, deriyi delip geçmiş ve yırtmış. Kan damarlarındaki şişlik ve çeşitli yaralanmalar, yaranın olduğundan çok daha korkunç görünmesine neden oluyor. Eğer bir parça tesirli bomba onu yaralamış olsaydı Sauerback'in kafatasının üçte birini alıp götürürdü.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}It is a stab wound from a glancing blow — a long and narrow blade pierced and tore through the skin. The swelling and various injuries to the blood vessels make the injury look far more gruesome than it is. If a shard from a frag grenade really had struck him, it would have taken out a good third of Sauerback's skull.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Wunde wurde offensichtlich durch eine lange und schmale Klinge verursacht, die die Haut des Mannes durchschnitten hat. Durch die Schwellung und mehrere verletzte Blutgefäße sieht die Verletzung schlimmer aus, als sie ist. Hätte ihn tatsächlich ein Granatsplitter getroffen, hätte er ein gutes Drittel von Sauerbacks Schädel zerfetzt.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}It is a stab wound from a glancing blow — a long and narrow blade pierced and tore through the skin. The swelling and various injuries to the blood vessels make the injury look far more gruesome than it is. If a shard from a frag grenade really had struck him, it would have taken out a good third of Sauerback's skull.{/n}

languages.text: {n}かすめるような一撃による刺し傷。長い細長い刃が皮膚を突き破って裂いた。腫れや血管の損傷が傷をより恐ろしいものに見せている。もしフラググレネードの破片が彼に当たっていたら、サウアーバックの頭蓋骨の3分の1は取られていただろう。{/n}

If a shard from a frag grenade really had struck him, it would have taken out a good third of Sauerback's skull.{/n}
